form.formComment: Resumes after a break of five-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign when last in a small field at Nottingham October 29 over 2800m, soft track; 20 len behind Blazeon Five with 63kg at $12. When resuming last campaign third in a small field at Doncaster May 17 over 2900m, 0.8 len behind Clockmaker with 56.5kg at $15. Can play a major role.

formComments.title: TAB

Finished off last campaign when last in a small field at Nottingham October 29 over 2800m, soft track; 20 len behind Blazeon Five with 63kg at $12. When resuming last campaign third in a small field at Doncaster May 17 over 2900m, 0.8 len behind Clockmaker with 56.5kg at $15. Can play a major role.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign 14th of 22 at Doncaster November 8 over 2400m, on heavy track; 19 len behind Castle Cove with 53.5kg at $26. First up last campaign fifth of 7 at Goodwood August 23 over 2400m, 1.3 len behind Prince Of The Seas with 61kg at $10. Among the chances.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation third in a small field at Wolverhampton November 29 over 2800m, 1.0 len behind Bahadur with 61kg at $7. Previously first up; eighth of 14 at Haydock Park May 31 over 2400m, 6 len behind Stressfree carrying 58.5kg at $101. Strong top three prospect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-5.5). Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation third in a small field at Wolverhampton November 29 over 2800m, 1.0 len behind Bahadur with 61kg at $7. Previously first up; eighth of 14 at Haydock Park May 31 over 2400m, 6 len behind Stressfree carrying 58.5kg at $101. Strong top three prospect.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Comes off a 29 day let-up. At the latest run won by 10 len at Huntingdon March 11 over 4100m defeating Saccary with 75.5kg at $5.50. The run before that ran on from midfield and won by 1.0 len at Chelmsford February 12 over 2800m defeating Tryfan with 58kg at $4. Major player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(11). Chasing a hat-trick. Comes off a 29 day let-up. At the latest run won by 10 len at Huntingdon March 11 over 4100m defeating Saccary with 75.5kg at $5.50. The run before that ran on from midfield and won by 1.0 len at Chelmsford February 12 over 2800m defeating Tryfan with 58kg at $4. Major player.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign by 1.5 len Redcar October 4 over 2800m defeating Division Day carrying 61kg at $3.80. First up last campaign third of 12 at Kempton Park All Weather July 9 over 2220m, 2.5 len behind Skimmer carrying 59kg at $51. Looks a key runner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Gelding back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign by 1.5 len Redcar October 4 over 2800m defeating Division Day carrying 61kg at $3.80. First up last campaign third of 12 at Kempton Park All Weather July 9 over 2220m, 2.5 len behind Skimmer carrying 59kg at $51. Looks a key runner.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 3rd of 7 at Lingfield All Weather on March 20 over 3200m, 2 len behind St Faz carrying 60.5kg at $3.30. Previously second-up favourite; scored a big 9 len win at Great Yarmouth August 6 over 2800m defeating Dereham carrying 67.5kg at $2.60. Hard to beat.
